channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [ANGELONE] Angel One: April 2026 ADTO Up 41.3% YoY to ₹52,210 Bn
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Angel One Ltd reports key business parameters for April 2026. Overall Average Daily Turnover (ADTO) based on notional turnover increased by 41.3% YoY to ₹52,210 Bn. The company's client base grew to 37.79 million, a 20% increase YoY. Retail turnover market share based on option premium turnover for overall equity stood at 20.5%. Average Daily Orders moderated from March 2026 but remained above the FY26 average. The average client funding book softened during the month.

  • Angel One's overall ADTO increased by 41.3% YoY, reaching ₹52,210 Bn in April 2026.
  • Client base grew to 37.79 million, reflecting a 20% YoY increase.
  • Retail turnover market share for overall equity based on option premium turnover is 20.5%.
  • Average Daily Orders moderated from March but remained above FY26 average.
  • Average client funding book softened in April 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Angel One Ltd | Category: Monthly Update

item.title: [GALLANTT] Gallantt Ispat: Independent Directors Resign
item.description:
Gallantt Ispat Ltd announced the resignation of two independent directors, Mrs. Smita Modi (DIN: 01141396) and Mr. Pankaj Khanna (DIN: 10377030), effective from the close of business hours on May 5th, 2026. Both directors cited work pressure, pre-occupation, lack of time, and other engagements as reasons for their resignation. The Board acknowledged their contributions and recorded their resignations.

  • Mrs. Smita Modi resigned as Independent Director effective May 5, 2026.
  • Mr. Pankaj Khanna resigned as Independent Director effective May 5, 2026.
  • Both directors cited work pressure and time constraints as reasons.
  • The Board expressed gratitude for their services.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Gallantt Ispat Ltd | Category: Management Change

item.title: [ELPROINTL] Elpro International: Trading Window Closed for Delisting
item.description:
Elpro International Ltd. announced the closure of its trading window for designated persons and their immediate relatives from May 6, 2026, until 48 hours after the declaration of the outcome of the Board meeting scheduled for May 8, 2026. The closure is related to the consideration of the delisting proposal of the company's equity shares, as per the company's internal code and SEBI regulations. A board meeting is scheduled to consider the delisting proposal and related matters.

  • Elpro International's trading window closed May 6, 2026, due to delisting proposal.
  • Board meeting on May 8, 2026, to consider delisting and due diligence reports.
  • Delisting proposal involves IGE (India) and Zenox Technology Services as Acquirers.
  • Shareholders' approval may be sought as per SEBI Delisting Regulations.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ELPRO INTERNATIONAL LTD. | Category: Delisting

item.title: [VENKYS] Venkys Board Meeting on 14 May 2026 to Approve Audited Results
item.description:
Venkys (India) Ltd has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting on May 14, 2026, to consider and approve the Audited Financial Results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The board will also consider recommending a dividend on equity shares.

  • Board meeting scheduled for May 14, 2026.
  • Meeting to approve audited financial results for FY26.
  • Dividend recommendation on equity shares to be considered.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: VENKY'S (INDIA) LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [ELPROINTL] Elpro International: GST Investigation Closed
item.description:
Elpro International Ltd. announced the closure of GST investigations by the Central GST Department, Mumbai and Pune Divisions, following proceedings initiated in March 2026. The closure, under Section 74A(8) of the Central GST Act, 2017, was communicated via a letter dated May 4, 2026, received on May 5, 2026. The closure follows the company's submission of documents, information, and reversal of Input Tax Credit (ITC) amounting to ₹14,09,954. The company states that the closure has no material impact on its financials or operations.

  • GST investigations against Elpro International closed under Section 74A(8).
  • Closure follows reversal of ₹14,09,954 Input Tax Credit (ITC).
  • The company received official closure letter on May 5, 2026.
  • Elpro International reports no material impact on financials or operations.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ELPRO INTERNATIONAL LTD. | Category: Regulatory

item.title: [LEMONTREE] Lemon Tree Signs License Agreement for Ahilyanagar Hotel
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Lemon Tree Hotels Ltd has signed a License Agreement for a new Lemon Tree Hotel in Ahilyanagar, Maharashtra. The hotel, managed by Carnation Hotels Private Limited, will feature 95 rooms, a restaurant, banquet hall, meeting room, and recreational amenities including a swimming pool, spa, and fitness center. This marks Lemon Tree's 30th property in Maharashtra, with 15 operational and 15 in the pipeline, expanding its presence in high-growth urban markets and catering to corporate, defense-related, and pilgrimage travelers.

  • Lemon Tree Hotels signs agreement for Lemon Tree Hotel, Ahilyanagar.
  • The Ahilyanagar property will be managed by Carnation Hotels Private Limited.
  • The hotel will feature 95 rooms and various amenities.
  • This signing brings Lemon Tree's Maharashtra portfolio to 30 properties.
  • The hotel aims to serve business, defense, and pilgrimage travelers.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Lemon Tree Hotels Ltd | Category: Business Update

item.title: [SHREYAS] Transworld Shipping Lines Sells Vessel for $4.8 Million
item.description:
Transworld Shipping Lines Ltd has signed a Memorandum of Agreement (MOA) on May 5, 2026, to sell its vessel, M.V. SSL Bharat, to Avana Logistek Limited for US$ 4,800,000. The agreement does not involve any related party transactions or shareholding implications.

  • Transworld Shipping Lines sells M.V. SSL Bharat to Avana Logistek Limited.
  • The sale consideration for the vessel is US$ 4,800,000.
  • The agreement was formalized through a Memorandum of Agreement (MOA) signed on May 5, 2026.
  • The transaction does not involve related parties or share issuance.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SHREYAS SHIPPING & LOGISTICS LTD. | Category: Sale

item.title: [INDGN] Indegene Receives ₹43.69 Cr Income Tax Demand
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Indegene Ltd has received an assessment order under Section 143(3) read with 144C(3) read with 144B of the Income Tax Act, 1961 for the Assessment Year 2023-24 (corresponding to the Financial Year 2022-23), resulting in an income tax demand of ₹43,68,84,410 (including interest). The demand arises from transfer pricing adjustments made by the Income Tax Authority. Indegene believes its positions are well-supported and is pursuing resolution through the Mutual Agreement Procedure (MAP) under the Double Taxation Avoidance Agreement (DTAA) between India & USA, while also exploring domestic appellate remedies. The company does not expect any material adverse impact on its financial position or operations.

  • Indegene received an income tax demand of ₹43.69 Cr for AY 2023-24.
  • The demand is due to transfer pricing adjustments of ₹123.41 Cr.
  • Indegene is pursuing resolution via MAP under the India-USA DTAA.
  • The company will also pursue domestic appellate remedies.
  • Indegene anticipates no material adverse impact on its financials.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Indegene Ltd | Category: Tax & Penalty

item.title: [KRITINUT] Kriti Nutrients Audited Financial Results for FY26
item.description:
Kriti Nutrients Ltd has submitted its standalone and consolidated audited financial results for the year ended March 31, 2026, as per Regulation 33 of the SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015. The results, along with the auditor's report, statement of assets and liabilities, and cash flow statement, were approved by the Audit Committee and Board of Directors on May 5, 2026. The auditor's report has no modifications or qualifications. The company is in the process of filing the results in XBRL format and will publish them in English and Hindi newspapers.

  • Standalone & Consolidated Audited Financial Results submitted for FY26.
  • Auditor's Report has no modification/qualification.
  • Results approved by Audit Committee and Board of Directors on May 5, 2026.
  • Financial results will be published in English and Hindi newspapers.
  • Filing in XBRL format is in process.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Kriti Nutrients Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [CIGNITI] Cigniti Technologies: Record Date for Coforge Merger is May 16, 2026
item.description:
Cigniti Technologies Ltd. announced that May 16, 2026, has been fixed as the record date to determine the eligibility of Cigniti shareholders to receive Coforge equity shares in a 1:1 share exchange ratio, following the amalgamation of Cigniti with Coforge. This decision was made by the Board of Coforge at its meeting on May 5, 2026. The exchange will result in the cancellation of Cigniti shares and the issuance of new Coforge shares to eligible shareholders. The information is available on Cigniti's website.

  • Cigniti shareholders to receive Coforge shares in 1:1 ratio post-merger.
  • Record date for determining eligibility is set for May 16, 2026.
  • Cigniti shares will be cancelled, and Coforge shares issued to eligible shareholders.
  • Merger approved; Board of Coforge fixed the record date on May 5, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: CIGNITI TECHNOLOGIES LTD. | Category: Merger
